title: Viewer issue-detail view with formatted (markdown) content
description: The status-page viewer lists issues but clicking one gives no readable detail view. Add an issue-detail view: clicking an issue in the viewer opens a formatted panel/page showing title, id, status/severity/scope badges, description, acceptance criteria, root_cause/fix, depends_on (linked to their issues), and sprint fields. Render description, acceptance_criteria items, root_cause, fix, and notes as markdown so bullets, code spans, and emphasis display properly — these are already free-text strings in issue.schema.json, so richer text means authoring markdown in them, no schema change. Document in the schema descriptions (or CONTEXT) that these fields support markdown.
acceptance_criteria: Clicking an issue anywhere it appears in the viewer opens its detail view.
Detail view shows all populated issue fields; null/empty fields are omitted, not rendered as 'null'.
description, acceptance_criteria, root_cause, fix, and notes render markdown (bullets, code spans, emphasis, line breaks).
Markdown rendering is safe: no raw HTML injection from issue content.
depends_on ids link to the referenced issues' detail views, across partitions.
Viewer stays read-only and localhost-only; existing list views unchanged otherwise.
Field-level markdown support is documented (schema description text or CONTEXT note).
